descriptionHtml:
Grand Soleil 40 for sale 2005 | 3 Cabins Version

If you’re considering a reliable and comfortable cruiser, the Grand Soleil 40 for sale 2005 offers a good opportunity. Available in Liguria, this Italian-flagged yacht provides a balance of performance and user-friendly features, and she is in good condition, benefiting from careful ownership and regular maintenance.

General Specifications

  • Model: Grand Soleil 40
  • Year of Construction: 2005
  • Year of Registration: 2006
  • Hull Length: 11.99 metres
  • Overall Length: 12.29 metres
  • Beam: 3.76 metres
  • Draft: 2.15 metres
  • Displacement: Not specified
  • Maximum Speed: 8 knots
  • Cruising Speed: 7 knots
  • Flag: Italian
  • Visibility: Liguria
  • Hull Material: VTR (fibreglass)
  • Deck: GRP + Teak

Interior Layout

  • Cabins: 3 (Bow cabin with exclusive bathroom, two aft cabins)
  • Heads (Bathrooms): 2 (Bathroom in the bow and on the left side of the stern)
  • Galley: Located on the port side (left)
  • Heating: Webasto heating

Sails and Deck Equipment

  • Dacron Mainsail
  • Dacron Genoa
  • Lazy bag and lazy jack (for easier sail handling)
  • Bimini
  • Sprayhood
  • Tender included
  • Catwalk
  • Raft
  • Rina Safety Certificate: Valid until 2029

Engine and Technical Features

  • Engine: Yanmar 3JH4CE, 40hp
  • Fuel Type: Diesel
  • Transmission: Sdrive
  • Tank Capacity: 180 litres (fuel)
  • Water Tank: 370 litres
  • Boiler: Electric and motor-powered
  • Autoclave: Present

Electrical Systems

  • Voltage: 12-220V
  • Batteries: 6 (installed in 2022)
  • Battery Charger: Present (new Quick charger with remote display on chart table)

Navigation & Electronics

  • Complete Raymarine Instrumentation
  • Radar
  • Raymarine Autopilot (with wireless remote control)
  • Raymarine C80 Cartographic GPS
  • Wind, Speed, Graphics instrumentation (Raymarine)
  • Raymarine VHF (new)

Additional Details

  • Certification Expiry: 2029 (Rina safety certificate)
  • Desalination Plant: Not present

Overall, the Grand Soleil 40 for sale 2005 is ready for her next owner. She is well-maintained, thoughtfully equipped, and offers practical cruising features without unnecessary sophistication. For viewing arrangements or further details, inquiries are welcome.
